name: XML Sitemap Planner
shortBenefit: Sitemap structure, priority settings and URL count guide.
intro: Plan your XML sitemap structure with URL priority settings, change frequency guidance and page count to optimise crawl budget and indexation.

seo.title: XML Sitemap Planner — Sitemap Structure & Priority Guide | Varada Nexus
seo.description: Free XML sitemap planner. Plan sitemap structure with priority settings, change frequency and URL limits for optimal crawl budget and indexation.

assumptions: Priority settings: homepage 1.0, services 0.9, blog 0.7, products 0.8, location 0.7, other 0.5. Approx 1KB per URL in XML sitemap.
disclaimer: This tool provides an indicative estimate for general planning only and is not professional, legal, financial, medical or engineering advice. Reference values are editable defaults that vary by location, vendor, regulation and date. Verify critical figures with a qualified professional. Varada Nexus accepts no liability for decisions made using this tool.

faq.a: An XML sitemap lists all important URLs on your website with priority and change frequency hints, helping search engines discover and crawl your pages efficiently.

faq.q: How often should I update my sitemap?
faq.a: Update and resubmit your sitemap whenever you add or remove significant content. Most CMS platforms (WordPress, Shopify) auto-generate and update sitemaps.

faq.q: What is the maximum number of URLs in a sitemap?
faq.a: A single sitemap file can contain up to 50,000 URLs and must be under 50MB uncompressed. Larger sites use sitemap index files pointing to multiple sitemaps.
